description: Roller Shutter Controller using Waveshare RPi Relay Board (B) on Raspberry Pi 5

dependencies.install_command: sudo apt update && sudo apt install gpiod python3-flask

shutter_control.sh.description: Bash roller shutter controller with interlock safety and libgpiod daemon management

shutter_web.py.description: Flask REST API + HTML dashboard for 4-shutter web control

templates/index.html.description: Dark-theme dashboard with 4 shutter cards, animated blind icons, per-card ▲/■/▼ controls, global All Up/Stop/Down

shutter-web.service.description: systemd service for shutter_web.py — enable once, then use systemctl start/stop/status shutter-web

README.txt.description: User-facing installation, usage, and troubleshooting guide

CLAUDE.md.description: Critical facts, architecture notes, and constraints for AI assistants

safety.interlock_description: UP and DOWN relays are never active simultaneously; direction change requires 0.5s motor coil discharge delay

open.description: Move UP for duration then stop (default 30000ms)

close.description: Move DOWN for duration then stop (default 30000ms)

status.description: Show all shutter states and daemon PIDs

state_lost_on_reboot.description: State files and GPIO daemons are in /tmp — lost on reboot
state_lost_on_reboot.mitigation: Shutters stay at last physical position; add a systemd ExecStartPre to reset if needed

gpioset_exclusive_access.description: gpioget cannot read a line held by an active gpioset daemon
gpioset_exclusive_access.mitigation: State tracked via /tmp/shutter_board/shN.state files instead of live GPIO reads

rpi5_chip_number.description: RPi 5 GPIO chip may be gpiochip0 or gpiochip4 depending on firmware
rpi5_chip_number.mitigation: Script auto-detects the chip with the highest line count (≥27 required)

DEBUG.description: Set to 1 for verbose chip/version/state debug output

SHUTTER_SCRIPT.description: Path to shutter_control.sh used by the web server
